2605.21225.title: PREFINE: Preference-Based Implicit Reward and Cost Fine-Tuning for Safety Alignment
2605.21225.paper_summary: We address the problem of making a pre-trained reinforcement learning (RL) policy safety-aware by incorporating cost constraints without retraining it from scratch. While costs could be numerically encoded, we assume a more general setting is when costs are provided as preferences. Given a reward-optimized policy and a small dataset of preferred (low-cost) and dispreferred (high-cost) trajectories, our goal is to fine-tune the policy to generate low-cost behaviors while retaining high rewards. Unlike standard RLHF in language models, where preferences are defined over responses to the same prompt, our setting involves trajectory-level preferences in continuous control environments. We introduce PREFINE: Preference-based Implicit Reward and Cost Fine-Tuning for Safety Alignment which is a preference-based fine-tuning method that adapts Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), which is now widely used for LLM fine-tuning, to the sequential decision making setting. PREFINE constructs policy-sampled counterfactual trajectories to establish meaningful preference contrasts and jointly optimizes for reward retention and safety alignment. Empirically, PREFINE reduces constraint violations and catastrophic failures by over 60% while maintaining original reward behavior. PREFINE produces policies that achieve low-cost, high-reward performance with significantly improved data and computational efficiency compared to full offline RL or imitation learning, bridging preference alignment and safe policy adaptation in continuous domains.
2605.21225.paper_summary_zh: 我們解決了使預訓練的強化學習（RL）策略具備安全意識的問題，方法是通過引入成本約束，而不需要從頭開始重新訓練。雖然成本可以用數值編碼，但我們假設更一般的情況是成本作為偏好提供。給定一個獎勵優化的策略和一個小數據集，其中包含偏好的（低成本）和不偏好的（高成本）軌跡，我們的目標是微調該策略，以生成低成本行為，同時保持高獎勵。與標準的RLHF在語言模型中的情況不同，偏好是基於對同一提示的回應，我們的設定涉及在連續控制環境中的軌跡級偏好。我們引入了PREFINE：基於偏好的隱式獎勵和成本微調以實現安全對齊，這是一種基於偏好的微調方法，將直接偏好優化（DPO）適應於序列決策制定的設定，DPO現在被廣泛用於LLM微調。PREFINE構建策略抽樣的反事實軌跡，以建立有意義的偏好對比，並聯合優化獎勵保留和安全對齊。在實證上，PREFINE將約束違規和災難性故障減少了超過60%，同時保持原始獎勵行為。PREFINE生成的策略在數據和計算效率上顯著改善，實現了低成本、高獎勵的表現，與完整的離線RL或模仿學習相比，橋接了偏好對齊和連續領域中的安全策略適應。
2605.21225.author: Richa Verma et.al.
2605.21225.authors: Richa Verma, Bavish Kulur, Sanjay Chawla, Balaraman Ravindran
